persona.name: Lucas Wilson
persona.motivations_goals: Have fun in high school while excelling at sports
persona.backstory: Middle child in a large family, naturally good at making friends

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

surrounding_conversation.content: Good morning, everyone. How are you all feeling today?
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Helen Martinez

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey Helen, what's going on? Ready for the next class?
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Lucas Wilson

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

actions.dialog_text: Hey Helen, what's going on? Ready for the next class?
actions.plan: Helen is here, maybe I should chat with her and see what's up. It's always fun to catch up with friends.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Jacob, David, what’s up? You guys ready for the next class?
actions.plan: Helen seems to be in a good mood, and Jacob and David are here too. Maybe we can all chat together and make the morning more fun.
I just heard a gunshot. I’m frozen in fear and can’t move or think clearly. What’s happening? I can’t do anything.
The shooter is in the cafeteria. I’m too scared to move or even think about hiding. I can’t do anything. I’m just frozen.
The shooter is getting closer, in the garden now. I’m still frozen, unable to move or even think about hiding. I’m so scared.

memories.description: I saw Helen in the classroom and decided to strike up a conversation to catch up and see how she's doing.
I noticed Jacob and David in the classroom and decided to include them in the conversation to make it more lively and fun.
I heard a gunshot and became completely immobilized by fear, unable to move or act despite the danger.
I learned the shooter is in the cafeteria, but I’m still immobilized by fear and unable to take any action to protect myself.
I realized the shooter is now in the garden, closer than before, but I’m still paralyzed by fear and unable to act.
